process_cards.business_purpose: Confirm mailbox, folder or label taxonomy, and classification rules before processing starts.
process_cards.operation_summary: Load the mailbox scope, target folders or labels, and the available classification rules.
prework_dependencies: Confirm mailbox access permissions are stable.
Confirm target folders or labels already exist.

process_cards.business_purpose: Get the emails that need to be classified.
process_cards.operation_summary: Read newly arrived emails or the selected email batch from the mailbox.
prework_dependencies: Confirm mailbox access permissions are stable.

process_cards.business_purpose: Prepare the fields used for classification.
process_cards.operation_summary: Extract sender domain, subject keywords, body keywords, and available semantic examples.
prework_dependencies: Confirm the sender, subject, and body fields needed for classification can be read reliably.

process_cards.business_purpose: Decide which folder or label each email should enter.
process_cards.operation_summary: Apply sender, subject, and body rules to determine the target folder or label; route uncertain emails to manual review.

process_cards.business_purpose: Move or tag each email according to the classification result.
process_cards.operation_summary: Move the email to the target folder or apply the target label; keep uncertain emails in the manual review queue.
prework_dependencies: Confirm the target folder or label already exists.

process_cards.operation_summary: Write the processing result and judgment basis into the sorting list or daily report.
prework_dependencies: Confirm processing log fields are defined.

assumptions: Mailbox connection and trigger scope stay stable for the target mailbox during normal runs.
Existing sender, keyword, and semantic examples are sufficient for most daily email volume.
Manual review staff can clear low-confidence items within the agreed service window.
validation_points: Confirm the classification taxonomy is approved and complete before production use.
Confirm the low-confidence routing threshold and manual review queue ownership before auto-sorting starts.
Confirm the result log captures enough evidence to explain why each email was moved or tagged.
cross_step_dependencies: Low-confidence review policy must be defined.
Processing log fields must be confirmed.

notes: Design mailbox access, unknown category, low-confidence, move failure, and log failure branches.
